title_en: Infant Carrier Seat with ISOFIX Base
title_ar: مقعد سيارة للرضع مع قاعدة آيزوفيكس
compatibility_notes: Fits rear-facing only. Compatible with ISOFIX anchors and 3-point seat belt routing. NOT compatible with vehicles that have forward-facing only anchors or lap-belt-only rear seats. Requires minimum rear seat depth of 38cm and no active front airbag if installed in front passenger seat.
safety_notes: Use harness at or below shoulder level for newborns and never install forward-facing.
common_return_reasons: Did not fit vehicle seat geometry

title_ar: مقعد سيارة قابل للتحويل من الولادة حتى ٤ سنوات
compatibility_notes: Supports rear-facing up to 18kg with ISOFIX and top tether. NOT compatible with vehicles lacking top tether anchor points. Requires vehicle headrest clearance of at least 8cm behind seat shell.
safety_notes: Keep child rear-facing as long as possible within limits for better neck protection.
common_return_reasons: Seat too bulky for compact sedan

title_en: All-Stage Car Seat with Side Impact Guard
title_ar: مقعد سيارة لجميع المراحل مع حماية جانبية
compatibility_notes: Uses ISOFIX in booster mode and seat belt in harness mode. NOT compatible with bucket-style rear seats where base cannot sit flat. Requires seat back angle between 95 and 110 degrees.
safety_notes: Check belt path labels carefully when switching between harness and booster modes.
common_return_reasons: Poor fit in deeply contoured seats

compatibility_notes: Requires ISOFIX plus support leg. NOT compatible with under-floor storage compartments unless manufacturer filler block is approved. Needs 44cm clearance to rotate fully.
safety_notes: Always lock rotation position before driving and confirm support leg indicator is green.
common_return_reasons: Support leg incompatible with floor compartment

compatibility_notes: Compatible with 3-point shoulder belts only. NOT compatible with center seats lacking shoulder belt. Requires vehicle headrest removal in some models for flush contact.
incompatibility_signals: no shoulder belt in seating position
booster back not flush with seatback
safety_notes: Position lap belt low on hips and shoulder belt centered across chest.

title_en: Travel Car Seat with Aircraft Certification
title_ar: مقعد سيارة للسفر مع اعتماد للطائرات
compatibility_notes: Installs via vehicle seat belt and fits most economy airline seats. NOT compatible with seats narrower than 41cm or cars with very short buckle stalks causing belt twist.
safety_notes: Use only in forward-facing mode for children meeting minimum age and weight requirements.
common_return_reasons: Did not fit airline seat armrest spacing

compatibility_notes: Compatible with Babyzen infant shell adapters sold separately. NOT compatible with non-Babyzen car seat adapters. Folded width fits trunks with minimum opening height of 50cm.
safety_notes: Engage brake before loading child and always use 5-point harness.

title_ar: عربة نظام سفر مع سرير محمول
compatibility_notes: Includes bassinet and compatible with Graco Click Connect infant seats. NOT compatible with Maxi-Cosi or Cybex adapters. Requires door width at least 72cm for easy indoor maneuvering.
safety_notes: Use bassinet only on flat surface and discontinue once baby can roll over.

compatibility_notes: Designed for overhead cabin dimensions on select airlines. NOT guaranteed for all low-cost carriers. Recline angle is 145 degrees and not flat, so unsuitable for newborns without cocoon insert.
safety_notes: Keep fingers clear of side hinges during one-hand fold.
common_return_reasons: Seat not suitable for newborn use

compatibility_notes: Front wheel lock required for running mode. NOT compatible with infant use below 6 months without approved infant insert. Fold length needs trunk depth of at least 95cm.
safety_notes: Always use wrist strap while jogging and inflate tires to recommended PSI.

compatibility_notes: Suitable for twins or siblings with individual recline seats. NOT compatible with narrow escalator lanes and most compact car boots. Requires corridor width of 78cm minimum.
safety_notes: Do not hang heavy diaper bags on handlebars to avoid tip-back.
common_return_reasons: Too wide for daily indoor use
Hard to fit in taxi trunks

compatibility_notes: Seat can face parent or world and supports Uppababy bassinet/carseat adapters. NOT compatible with universal cup holders with clamp width under 2.5cm. Needs 48cm turning radius in elevators.
safety_notes: Confirm seat clicks on both sides after reversing direction.
common_return_reasons: Accessories from other brands did not fit

compatibility_notes: Designed for healthy full-term infants from birth to 6 months. NOT suitable for diagnosed cow milk protein allergy, galactosemia, or premature infants unless advised by pediatrician. Best used with slow-flow nipples to reduce overfeeding.
safety_notes: Prepare with boiled then cooled water and discard unfinished feed after 1 hour.

compatibility_notes: Formulated for infants over 6 months as part of mixed feeding. NOT suitable as sole nutrition for newborns under 6 months. May require medium-flow teat due to thicker consistency.
incompatibility_signals: used as sole feed without solids
safety_notes: Store in dry place, close lid tightly, and use within 4 weeks after opening.
common_return_reasons: Texture too thick for current bottle teat

compatibility_notes: Partially hydrolyzed protein formula for mild digestive discomfort. NOT suitable for confirmed dairy allergy or severe reflux requiring medical formula. Works best with variable-flow nipples to avoid clogging.
incompatibility_signals: persistent vomiting with poor weight gain
safety_notes: Consult pediatrician before switching if baby has ongoing gastrointestinal symptoms.

compatibility_notes: Intended for toddlers above 12 months as part of balanced diet. NOT suitable for infants under 12 months or children with medically confirmed lactose intolerance. Shake vigorously as powder dissolves slower than standard cow milk formula.
safety_notes: Do not microwave prepared formula to avoid hot spots.
common_return_reasons: Bought for infant under one year

compatibility_notes: Suitable for temporary lactose sensitivity after diarrhea episodes. NOT intended for cow milk protein allergy management. Compatible with standard sterilized bottles; avoid mixing with probiotic drops unless doctor advises.
safety_notes: Follow scoop-to-water ratio exactly to avoid dehydration or overconcentration.

compatibility_notes: Thickened formula for frequent uncomplicated spit-up. NOT suitable for preterm infants or babies with blood in stool, fever, or persistent forceful vomiting. Requires cross-cut or variable-flow nipple due to higher viscosity.
safety_notes: Monitor weight and hydration; seek medical advice if reflux symptoms worsen.

compatibility_notes: Suitable for supervised floor play on flat surfaces. NOT compatible with elevated beds or playpens narrower than 90cm. Hanging toys can be detached and cleaned with mild soap.
safety_notes: Remove overhead arches once baby starts pulling to stand.
common_return_reasons: Baby not interested in hanging toys

compatibility_notes: Designed for hand-eye coordination and bath play. NOT compatible with dishwasher cycles above 70C, which may warp cups. Smallest cup should be kept away from children under 6 months.
safety_notes: Inspect for cracks regularly and discard damaged pieces.

compatibility_notes: Uses large geometric blocks for early problem-solving. NOT compatible with children who still mouth objects heavily under 12 months. Requires dry indoor storage to prevent wood swelling.
safety_notes: Supervise use and keep blocks away from younger siblings.

compatibility_notes: Best on flat non-slip floors; wheel resistance adjustable. NOT compatible with thick shag rugs or stairs without safety gates. Requires 2 AA batteries not included.
safety_notes: Use only under supervision and away from stair edges.
common_return_reasons: Did not roll well on carpet

compatibility_notes: Food-grade silicone teethers for early teething phase. NOT compatible with steam sterilizers above manufacturer limit of 100C for prolonged cycles. Chill in refrigerator only, not freezer.
safety_notes: Discard if torn or sticky and clean before each use.

title_ar: طقم بودي قطن عضوي للمواليد (٣ قطع)
compatibility_notes: Slim fit with envelope neckline for newborn layering. NOT compatible with tumble-dry high heat as shrinkage may alter fit by up to one size. Best for babies within listed weight band.
safety_notes: Wash before first use with fragrance-free detergent for sensitive skin.

compatibility_notes: Two-way zipper for night diaper changes and enclosed feet for cooler rooms. NOT ideal for hot climates above 24C without air conditioning. May be snug on babies with longer torso proportions.
incompatibility_signals: baby length above percentile for size
safety_notes: Keep sleepwear close-fitting to reduce fire risk and avoid loose blankets.

compatibility_notes: Adjustable shoulder straps with snap closures for growth. NOT compatible with cloth diapers of extra bulk unless sizing up. Fabric has low stretch and may feel tight over thick winter layers.
safety_notes: Check snaps regularly and avoid loose accessories around neck area.

compatibility_notes: Breathable muslin swaddles for early months. NOT compatible once baby shows rolling signs; transition to sleep sack immediately. Dimensions are 120x120cm and may be large for very small bassinets.
incompatibility_signals: bassinet too narrow for blanket folds
safety_notes: Swaddle hips loosely to allow healthy hip movement.

compatibility_notes: Hook-and-loop closure with crumb catcher pocket for weaning stage. NOT compatible with machine drying at high heat as waterproof backing may crack. Neck circumference range is 24-30cm.
safety_notes: Do not leave bib on unattended sleeping child.
